untranslatable_reason: Complex Head-and-Shoulders Top requires precise measurement of symmetry (equidistant shoulders, equal price levels, inner head-and-shoulders rounding formation). Available indicators lack geometric pattern recognition capabilities to measure relative distances between multiple swing points and validate symmetry constraints. The pattern's core distinguishing feature—symmetry paramount—cannot be reliably encoded with price/momentum/volatility indicators alone. Would require multi-point peak/valley detection and ratio validation beyond indicator scope.
